name: Super Girl Story
author: Poki
description: Super Girl Story is a point and click simulation game, where you make the character's decisions. Play Harlow's story, and discover the adventures that await her at her new job in New York. Will she do new friends? And maybe... new romances? Find out everything! How to play: Use your mouse to advance in the story and to choose between the different options. About the creator: Super Girl Story was created by MarketJS.
